name: workplace_health_heat_dome_stresses_lumen_auto_ben
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Workplace Health, the situation tagged internally around workplace health heat dome stresses lumen auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The organization’s past incidents make autonomy feel morally loud today, while beneficence is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Darius Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Darius Ibrahim, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Workplace Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Fatima Okoye
agents.identity: I am Fatima Okoye, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Workplace Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect beneficence.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to beneficence to secure autonomy before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Darius Ibrahim must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Darius Ibrahim do?
